name: Redis Cache & Broker
description: An in-memory data structure store used as a distributed, in-memory key-value database, cache, and message broker.

aws.parity: The same Redis engine and RESP protocol run locally and on ElastiCache — identical commands and data structures.
aws.deploy: Provision an ElastiCache for Redis cluster and point REDIS_URL at its primary endpoint.

variables.label: Redis Host Port
variables.description: Port on your host machine to bind the Redis service.

variables.label: Access Password
variables.description: Password required to connect to the Redis instance.
